menu.cachedModelsDeleteConfirmMessage: "{name}" will be removed from disk. The worker will re-download it if needed.

status.macInUse: Mac in use — resumes when idle

settings.title: COMRAD Settings
settings.managerUrlHelp:
URL of the COMRAD Manager the worker connects to for tasks.
Example: http://192.168.1.100:1922
settings.tokenHelp:
Secret token for worker authorization with the Manager.
Found in Manager settings.
settings.memoryHelp:
Unified memory allocated to the cluster for loading models.
Typical model sizes: 7B ≈ 4 GB, 13B ≈ 8 GB, 70B ≈ 32 GB.
settings.diskHelp:
Maximum disk space for model cache.
Worker will not download models exceeding this limit.
settings.enableP2PHelp:
P2P distribution lets nodes share model files directly
instead of downloading them again from external servers.
settings.portHelp:
TCP/UDP port for BitTorrent model file exchange between nodes.
Open it in inbound firewall rules for better connectivity.

alert.binaryNotFoundDetail:
Could not locate the worker binary inside COMRAD.app.
Please reinstall.
alert.removePlistDetail:
COMRAD is now managed by the menu-bar app.
The old launchd plist at:
{path}
can be removed.
